control-center.name: Control Center
control-center._comment: Special handling to ensure public port is always set to settings.control_center_public_port

api-gateway.name: API Gateway
api-gateway._comment: All plugins API endpoints should be proxied through the API Gateway, and plugins should not be exposed directly to avoid port sprawl and to provide a single point for auth and TLS termination

dictionary.name: Dictionary
dictionary._comment: Personal dictionary app powered by a local LLM, not to be confused with the built-in dictionary feature in control center which is more of a quick reference tool

files.name: Files
files._comment: NAS file browser and manager, not to be confused with Nextcloud which is more of a full featured cloud storage solution

homarr.name: Homarr
homarr._comment: Dashboard app, can be used to create a custom dashboard for your homelab with links to your other apps and various widgets

link-downloader.name: Media Downloader
link-downloader._comment: App for downloading media from various sources, can be used with RSS feeds for automatic downloads

music-player.name: Music Player
music-player._comment: App for playing music, can be used with Link Downloader for a complete music management solution

personal-library.name: Personal Library
personal-library._comment: App for managing ebooks and other documents, can be used with Link Downloader for a complete ebook management solution

pihole.name: Pi-hole
pihole._comment: Network-wide ad blocker, make sure to set the upstream DNS server in Pi-hole to the IP of your homelab for it to work properly

status.name: Pi Status Board
status._comment: Dashboard for monitoring the status of your Raspberry Pi and other devices in your homelab, can be used to display system metrics, network status, and more

voice-ai.name: Pi Voice AI
voice-ai._comment: Voice assistant app powered by a local LLM, can be used for controlling other apps in your homelab with voice commands, setting reminders, and more

song-downloader.name: Song Downloader
song-downloader._comment: Downloads full-audio songs by query, can auto-rename, and can auto-transfer into /mnt/nas/media/music. It may use the Media Downloader API when available, with direct yt-dlp fallback.
